title: Human Brain Sequential Extraction (Tau)
author: Michael X. Henderson
materials: Thaw bag(s) of brain tissue On ice .
Move brain to petri dish and weigh it.
Bleach vacuum flask and rinse out.

steps.title: Make sure glass 100 or 40...
steps.instruction: Make sure glass 100 or 40 mL homogenizers and pestles (A and B) are cleaned with 70%ethanol, wrapped in foil, and autoclaved.

steps.title: Clean out ultracentrifuge tubes and caps...
steps.instruction: Clean out ultracentrifuge tubes and caps with 70% ethanol and dry.

steps.title: Transfer brain tissue to -20 °C...
steps.instruction: Transfer brain tissue to -20 °C freezer the night before (speeds up thaw).

steps.title: Ensure there are sufficient protease inhibitor, phosphatase inhibitor, and DTT
steps.instruction: Ensure there are sufficient protease inhibitor, phosphatase inhibitor, and DTT.

steps.title: Turn on the ultracentrifuge ( Optima...
steps.instruction: Turn on the ultracentrifuge ( Optima L-100 XP ), set the temperature for 4 °C and turn the vacuum on. Make sure Ti-45 and Ti-70 rotors are available. They may be in room 5124.

steps.title: Fill 2 buckets with wet ice
steps.instruction: Fill 2 buckets with wet ice.

steps.title: Record information about the tissue to be extracted
steps.instruction: Record information about the tissue to be extracted. Note the weight of the dish to be used forweighing the gray matter.

steps.title: Fill a 15 mL conical with...
steps.instruction: Fill a 15 mL conical with 10% neutral buffered formalin (NBF) and label with case number.

steps.title: Once tissue is thawed, remove meninges and blood vessels
steps.instruction: Once tissue is thawed, remove meninges and blood vessels. Cut one thin, representative pieceoff and transfer it to 10% neutral buffered formalin for fixation and subsequent IHC.

steps.title: Carefully resect the remaining gray matter...
steps.instruction: Carefully resect the remaining gray matter from white matter in ice-cold PBS. Transfer gray matterto a petri dish On ice to be weighed.

steps.title: Prepare 30 mL Extraction Buffer per gram gray matter
steps.instruction: Prepare 30 mL Extraction Buffer per gram gray matter. Add the following to ice-cold B aseBuffer : cOmplete protease inhibitor ( 1 tab / 50 mL ), phosphatase inhibitors (2&3) ( 1:100 ), 0.1 millimolar (mM) PMSF ( 1:5000 ), 2 millimolar (mM) DDT ( 1:500 ).

steps.title: Add 9 volumes of Extraction Buffer to the homogenizer tube
steps.instruction: Add 9 volumes of Extraction Buffer to the homogenizer tube. Cut gray matter into small bits,and use a buffer to transfer these bits to the tube.

steps.title: Homogenize with pestle A until the pestle moves easily
steps.instruction: Homogenize with pestle A until the pestle moves easily.

steps.title: Homogenize with pestle B 3x 25 strokes
steps.instruction: Homogenize with pestle B 3x 25 strokes. Save 200 µL of this as Total Homogenate.

steps.title: Pour homogenate evenly into Ti-45 tubes...
steps.instruction: Pour homogenate evenly into Ti-45 tubes (fits ~ 50 mL /tube). Balance tubes to within 0.1 g .

steps.title: Spin at 11300 rpm, , in...
steps.instruction: Spin at 11300 rpm, , in the Ti-45 ( 10000 x g, , ) for 00:10:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Pour supernatant into 50 mL conical...
steps.instruction: Pour supernatant into 50 mL conical by filtering it through a piece of kimwipe folded into twolayers placed in a funnel. Save 200 µL of this as Sup 1.

steps.title: Add 9 volumes Extraction Buffer to...
steps.instruction: Add 9 volumes Extraction Buffer to the centrifuge tube and homogenizer. Transfer pellet inbuffer to homogenizer.

steps.title: Homogenize with pestle A until the pestle moves easily
steps.instruction: Homogenize with pestle A until the pestle moves easily.

steps.title: Homogenize with pestle B 3x 25 strokes
steps.instruction: Homogenize with pestle B 3x 25 strokes. Save 200 µL of this as Pel 1.

steps.title: Pour homogenate evenly into Ti-45 tubes (fits ~50 mL/tube)
steps.instruction: Pour homogenate evenly into Ti-45 tubes (fits ~50 mL/tube). Balance tubes to within 0.1 g .

steps.title: Spin at 11300 rpm, , in...
steps.instruction: Spin at 11300 rpm, , in the Ti-45 ( 10000 x g, , ) for 00:10:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: During the spin, transfer Sup 1...
steps.instruction: During the spin, transfer Sup 1 to a beaker with a stir bar. Add sarkosyl to a final 1%.

steps.title: Pour supernatant into 50 mL conical...
steps.instruction: Pour supernatant into 50 mL conical by filtering it through a piece of kimwipe folded into twolayers placed in a funnel. Save 200 µL of this as Sup 2.

steps.title: Combine Sup 1 and Sup 2...
steps.instruction: Combine Sup 1 and Sup 2 in a beaker with a stir bar. Add sarkosyl to a final 1% concentration(1/27). Save 200 µL of this as Total Sup.

steps.title: Stir Total Sup for 1- 01:30:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Stir Total Sup for 1- 01:30:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Add the Extraction Buffer to the...
steps.instruction: Add the Extraction Buffer to the centrifuge tube and transfer the pellet to the homogenizer. You can use the same vol as Sup 2 for homogenization. Save 200 µL equivalent of this as Pel 2. If you used a smaller volume, correct this by diluting the sample.

steps.title: Add Total Sup to Ti-45 tubes
steps.instruction: Add Total Sup to Ti-45 tubes. Balance tubes to within 0.1 g . Spin at 40000 rpm, , in the Ti-45 ( 125000 x g, , ) for 01:15:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Pipet out supernatant into a beaker
steps.instruction: Pipet out supernatant into a beaker. Myelin will have floated. Remove this with a pipette. Save 200 µL of this as Sark Sup. At this point, the pellet should be tight, sticky, and red-brown in color.

steps.title: Use the vacuum to aspirate remaining...
steps.instruction: Use the vacuum to aspirate remaining liquid around the Sark Pellet. Do NOT put tubing into centrifuge tube. You can use multiple connected pipet tips, if needed.

steps.title: Add 10 mL DPBS to each...
steps.instruction: Add 10 mL DPBS to each centrifuge tube to wash the Sark Pellet. Use the vacuum to remove DPBS.

steps.title: Add 2 mL DPBS to wash...
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL DPBS to wash Sark Pellet a second time. Use vacuum to remove DPBS.

steps.title: Add 1 mL DPBS to each tube
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL DPBS to each tube. Pipette liquid towards the Sark Pellet with a cut P1000 tip until thepellet has loosened. Use a transfer pipette to transfer the pellet to a Ti-70 centrifuge tube. This step is tricky. Be careful to not lose the Sark Pellet.

steps.title: Use a cut P1000 tip to...
steps.instruction: Use a cut P1000 tip to pipette up and down to resuspend the pellet.

steps.title: Add DPBS into the centrifuge tube to reach maximum volume
steps.instruction: Add DPBS into the centrifuge tube to reach maximum volume. Balance tubes to within 0.1 g .

steps.title: Spin Sark Pel at 50000 rpm,...
steps.instruction: Spin Sark Pel at 50000 rpm, , in the Ti-70 ( 18000 x g, , ) for 00:30:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Save 200 µL of the supernatant as DPBS wash
steps.instruction: Save 200 µL of the supernatant as DPBS wash. Remove the remaining supernatant by vacuum.

steps.title: Add 100 µL DPBS/ 1 g tissue to the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL DPBS/ 1 g tissue to the pellet. Use a cut P1000 tip to first loosen the pellet, thenbreak it up as much as possible without pipetting up and down. Transfer to 1.5 mL tubes. This is a tricky step as the pellet may stick to the pipette tip.

steps.title: Vortex briefly and spin in a...
steps.instruction: Vortex briefly and spin in a tabletop centrifuge at 1000 x g, , for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Bleach all homogenizers, tools and tubes,...
steps.instruction: Bleach all homogenizers, tools and tubes, but use only soap for metal lids.

steps.title: Rinse centrifuge tubes for 00:10:00 after bleaching
steps.instruction: Rinse centrifuge tubes for 00:10:00 after bleaching.

steps.title: Move fixed brain to leaching buffer...
steps.instruction: Move fixed brain to leaching buffer and cassette for paraffin embedding.

steps.title: Spin in a tabletop centrifuge at...
steps.instruction: Spin in a tabletop centrifuge at 1000 x g, , for 00:01:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Pass the suspension repeatedly through a...
steps.instruction: Pass the suspension repeatedly through a 27G ½ needle to homogenize. If the clumps are large, start with the bigger 19G 1 ½ needle. Centrifuge at 1000 x g, , for 00:01:00 if needed to bring materials to the bottom of the tube.

steps.title: Transfer the resuspended Sark Pel to an autoclaved 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the resuspended Sark Pel to an autoclaved 1.5 mL Beckman ultracentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 100 µL DPBS to the...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL DPBS to the centrifuge tube and resuspend well. Save 30 µL as Sark Pel.

steps.title: Balance tubes to within 0
steps.instruction: Balance tubes to within 0.1g. Spin in OptimaMAX-TL (room 5124) ( TLA100.3 rotor with adaptors) at 45000 rpm, , ( 80000 x g, , ) for 00:30:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 100 µL DPBS/1 g tissue to the pellet.

steps.title: Vortex to mix
steps.instruction: Vortex to mix. Freeze or continue to process Sark Pellet.

steps.title: Sonicate the Sark Pellet with 20x...
steps.instruction: Sonicate the Sark Pellet with 20x 1 sec pulses with hand sonicator.

steps.title: Balance tubes to within 0
steps.instruction: Balance tubes to within 0.1g. Spin in OptimaMAX-TL (room 5124) ( TLA100.3 rotor withadaptors) at 45000 rpm, , ( 80000 x g, , ) for 00:30:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Transfer supernatant into another tube as...
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant into another tube as High g Sup using sterile pipette tips.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet with 20% of...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet with 20% of the volume of DPBS (e.g. for 700 µL Sup, add 140 µL ).

steps.title: Sonicate High g Pellet for 90-120x...
steps.instruction: Sonicate High g Pellet for 90-120x 00:00:01 pulses with hand sonicator On ice to break up the pellet. Save 10 µL as High g Pel.

steps.title: Transfer the resuspended High g Pellet to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the resuspended High g Pellet to a 1.5 mL tube. Spin in tabletop centrifuge at 10000 x g, , for 00:30:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Transfer supernatant using a sterile pipette tip to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant using a sterile pipette tip to a 1.5 mL tube. Save 20 µL as Low g Sup. This is the final supernatant that CONTAINS ENRICHED PATHOLOGICAL TAU.

steps.title: Add an equal volume of DPBS...
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume of DPBS to the pellet and sonicate 30x 00:00:01 pulses with hand sonicator to resuspend the pellet. Save 200 µL of the pellet as Log g Pel.
